surface.name: New Relic Event API custom event via cURL
surface.selection_basis: Event API docs invite creating a free account (no credit card) and submitting compressed JSON with curl using Api-Key (license key) to insights-collector.newrelic.com. Prefer cURL ingest over installing APM agents for first API success.

alternatives_considered.name: Install APM agent guided install
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Agent install is a longer path; Event API documents curl as the direct ingest call.

alternatives_considered.name: NerdGraph query-first
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Query/config API after data exists; Event API creates first custom telemetry.

entry_point.developer_intent: Create a New Relic account, copy a license key, and POST a custom event with cURL.
assumed_prior_state: No New Relic account or license key exists.
A terminal with cURL and gzip is available.

documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: Compressed cURL POST to the Event API returns HTTP 200 with a uuid acknowledgment.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: HTTP 200 JSON includes uuid for the submission.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: Event API documents license key, curl POST with compression, and 200 success with uuid.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: First ingest success is an acknowledged Event API POST. NRQL visibility may lag asynchronously.

prerequisites.requirement: New Relic account (free; no credit card required per Event API page).

primary_path.action: Create a New Relic account and open the account UI.
primary_path.success_signal: API keys / license key settings reachable.

primary_path.action: Copy the ingest license key for the account.
POST a gzip-compressed JSON event array to https://insights-collector.newrelic.com/v1/accounts/EVENTS with Api-Key and Content-Type application/json.
details: Use regional collector host for EU/JP accounts.

primary_path.action: Confirm the 200 acknowledgment uuid (optionally NRQL SELECT * FROM YOUR_CUSTOM_EVENT later).

sources.title: Send custom events with our Event API

uncertainties.question: Exact path segment for EVENTS vs account-scoped URL in current curl samples.
uncertainties.impact: Request URL may include account id variants.
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: Docs show Linux/bash examples behind UI toggles; regional hosts are explicit.
